title: Easy Ankylosaurus Coloring Page

seoDescription: Download this cute, simple cartoon Ankylosaurus coloring page for toddlers and kids. Thick outlines and simple spaces. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The back of Ankylosaurus was covered in osteoderms—bony plates fused directly into its skin, acting like a natural shield of armor.
Ankylosaurus was a heavily armored herbivorous dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous period, around 68 to 66 million years ago.
